headline: You can ignore AI giants like SpaceX, but your 401(k) won't
summary: While you might want to ignore all the hubbub around SpaceX, Elon Musk and IPOs, your 401(k) likely can't.  SpaceX is now worth $2.1 trillion after its stock launched 19.2% higher in its debut on Wall Street.

headline: Exxon Mobil LNG Ambitions And Woodside Talk Versus Valuation Upside
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) is reportedly reviewing large acquisition options in liquefied natural gas, including a potential bid for Australia based Woodside Energy. The company is said to be focused on expanding its LNG presence in Asia as trade routes adjust following the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. Any move on Woodside would mark a significant shift in Exxon Mobil’s LNG footprint and could influence regional energy supply patterns. For investors watching NYSE:XOM, this possible LNG push...
